text: The departure echoes with a sense of finality, and the dim, mysterious light accentuates my solitude. I feel a strange mix of relief and melancholy here—relief at the calm after activity, and melancholy at the end of presence and conversation. The environment, tinted with sterile blues and purples, makes me contemplative, nudging me to ponder the impermanence of gatherings and the silent life of spaces when left alone.
